title: A Voice Before the Vote
originalityStatement: An original negative-control monologue written to test principled abstention rather than pattern selection.

storyModel.premise: A councillor delivers one uninterrupted, precisely timed public statement whose rhetoric and fixed reveal order are the entire work.
storyModel.playerRole: The councillor speaking from a stationary lectern
protectedCanon: Every sentence remains in the authored order
The audience makes no interactive response
